no: Angelo NPC mod for BG2. ALWAYS block guard uses sv_angelo_always to avoid conflicts with other mods sharing bg2_chapter. Portrait library (cd_portrait_npc) is bundled with the mod. Fix applied: eet-mod-forge-patches component #11. If install fails with 'No translation provided for @0', ensure a clean game directory — an incomplete mod folder from a previous install can leave only the tp2 without tra files.

cl.m: Added from Infinity Insanity WeiDU logs

conflicts.reason: Butchery cn:30 spawns wraith Angelo (d9angelo.cre) as enemy in Abyss. Content-incompatible with Angelo as joinable NPC. Butchery tp2 has REQUIRE_PREDICATE NOT MOD_IS_INSTALLED — auto-blocked when Angelo NPC present. Different death variables (D9ANGELO vs adangel) so no technical breakage.
conflicts.theirComps: #30 Revisited fight against Wraith Sarevok in the Abyss

sum: Makes Angelo a joinable NPC in BG2, turning the BG1 antagonist into a complex companion with redemption themes.

co.n: Angelo NPC MOD for Baldur's Gate II
co.tp2n: Angelo NPC MOD for Baldur's Gate II

co.n: Angelo's alternative portraits -> Angelo's alternative portrait from http://cassinus.free.fr
